resources.string: Game Assistant Plus injects Lenovo LSR compatibility on non-baldur boards and controls the active GPP whitelist.

Select the packages that should stay in the active LSR whitelist. GAP asks for root on launch because saving rewrites gpp_app_list, restarts gppservice, and force-stops ZuiGameHelper so the change takes effect immediately.
Saved custom whitelist and restarted gppservice. ZuiGameHelper was force-stopped.
Restored the device default whitelist and restarted gppservice. ZuiGameHelper was force-stopped.
No packages match the current search or visibility filter.
GAP needs root access when it opens so it can save changes immediately. Grant root access and try again.
